options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates of the area to verify

options.name: -detailed
options.description: Generates a detailed metal density report

options.name: -ignoreLEFDensity
options.description: Ignore MACRO density table in LEF file

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies the LEF or Encounter layers to verify

options.name: -oversize
options.description: Specifies an offset value for the area to verify

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the report file for the metal density violation information
